name: Heatblast
hints: This alien is made of magma and fire.
It belongs to the Pyronite species.
Ben first used him to stop a burning building.

name: XLR8
hints: This alien can move at supersonic speeds.
It looks like a blue velociraptor.
Its species is Kineceleran.

name: Four Arms
hints: This alien is incredibly strong and has 4 arms.
It is red with black stripes.
Its species is Tetramand.

name: Diamondhead
hints: This alien is made of organic crystal.
It can regenerate its limbs.
Its species is Petrosapien.

name: Ghostfreak
hints: This alien can phase through solid matter.
It lives in total darkness and is creepy.
Its species is Ectonurite.

name: Upgrade
hints: This alien can merge with technology to upgrade it.
It is black and green with circuitry lines.
Its species is Galvanic Mechamorph.

name: Cannonbolt
hints: This alien can curl into a ball to smash things.
It is very durable and bouncy.
Its species is Arburian Pelarota.

name: Wildmutt
hints: This alien acts like a beast but has no eyes.
It uses senses like smell and hearing.
Its species is Vulpimancer.

name: Stinkfly
hints: This alien is an insectoid that can fly.
It can shoot slime from its eyes and mouth.
Its species is Lepidopterran.

name: Ripjaws
hints: This alien can breathe underwater.
It has a very large jaw and sharp teeth.
Its species is Piscciss Volann.

name: Grey Matter
hints: This alien is tiny but incredibly smart.
It can understand the workings of any machine.
Its species is Galvan.

name: Way Big
hints: This alien is gigantic, the size of a skyscraper.
It creates cosmic storms when angry.
Its species is To'kustar.

name: Humungousaur
hints: This alien can grow in size.
It is a dinosaur-like alien with brute strength.
Its species is Vaxasaurian.

name: Swampfire
hints: This alien controls plant life and fire.
It is methane-based and smells bad.
Its species is Methanosian.

name: Big Chill
hints: This alien can become intangible and freeze things.
It looks like a blue moth.
Its species is Necrofriggian.

name: Echo Echo
hints: This alien can clone itself into multiple copies.
It is made of living metal and produces sound waves.
Its species is Sonorosian.

name: Alien X
hints: This alien can warp reality and time.
It requires a debate between two personalities to act.
Its species is Celestialsapien.

name: Jetray
hints: This alien can fly and swim at high speeds.
It shoots neuroshock blasts from its eyes.
Its species is Aerophibian.

name: Chromastone
hints: This alien can absorb and project energy and light.
Its body looks like a crystal prism.
Its species is Crystalsapien.

name: Brainstorm
hints: This alien has super intelligence and electrokinesis.
It looks like a crab with a large brain.
Its species is Cerebrocrustacean.

name: Spidermonkey
hints: This alien is agile and can shoot webs.
It has four arms and looks like a blue monkey.
Its species is Arachnichimp.

name: Goop
hints: This alien is made of slime and can't hold its shape without its Anti-Gravity Projector.
It is indestructible.
Its species is Polymorph.

name: Lodestar
hints: This alien controls metal using magnetism.
It has floating metal claws and a metallic face.
Its species is Biosovortian.

name: Rath
hints: This alien is an Appoplexian with anger issues.
He yells 'Let me tell you something!' a lot.
He is a tiger-like alien.

name: Nanomech
hints: This alien is microscopic in size.
It can shoot electricity from its hands.
Its species is Nanomechian.
